# Code

An inline code display component for rendering code snippets within text. Renders a `<code>` element with visual styling.

## Import

```jsx
import { Code } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"plain" \| "subtle" \| "surface" \| "outline"` | `"subtle"` | The visual style variant |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | - | The color palette to use (e.g., `"gray"`, `"red"`, `"blue"`) |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"sm"` | The size of the code text |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Text>
  Run the <Code>npm install</Code> command to install dependencies.
</Text>
```

### Variants

```jsx
<Code variant="plain">plain code</Code>
<Code variant="subtle">subtle code</Code>
<Code variant="surface">surface code</Code>
<Code variant="outline">outline code</Code>
```

### With color palette

```jsx
<Code colorPalette="red">error.code</Code>
<Code colorPalette="green">success.code</Code>
<Code colorPalette="blue">info.code</Code>
```

### Different sizes

```jsx
<Code size="xs">extra small</Code>
<Code size="sm">small</Code>
<Code size="md">medium</Code>
<Code size="lg">large</Code>
```

## Features

- Renders inline `<code>` elements with visual distinction from surrounding text
- Supports 4 visual variants: plain, subtle, surface, and outline
- Supports color palettes for semantic code highlighting
- Supports multiple sizes
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
